# files_event_record (Data Source)

An EventRecord is a durable event emitted by Files.com for routing through Event Channels.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "files_event_record" "example_event_record" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Event Record ID

### Read-Only

- `actor` (Dynamic) Actor associated with the event.
- `created_at` (String) Event Record create date/time.
- `event_type` (String) Versioned event type string.
- `event_uuid` (String) Stable event UUID.
- `human_fields` (Dynamic) Human-readable event detail fields.
- `human_summary` (String) Human-readable event summary.
- `human_title` (String) Human-readable event title.
- `occurred_at` (String) Event occurrence date/time.
- `payload` (Dynamic) Event payload.
- `resources` (Dynamic) Resources associated with the event.
- `severity` (String) Event severity.
- `source_id` (Number) Source record ID.
- `source_type` (String) Source record type.
- `workspace_id` (Number) Workspace ID. 0 means the default workspace or site-wide.
